description: Phase 1 Read Path — React Query hooks for all borrow data reads, Stability Pool reads, derived computation hooks, and a dashboard UI showing positions and SP deposits

userStories.title: Create use-system-params read hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook that fetches immutable system parameters (MCR, CCR, minDebt) so the UI can display limits and validate inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-system-params.ts
Uses useQuery from @tanstack/react-query with query key ['borrow', 'systemParams', symbol]
Calls sdk.getSystemParams(symbol) via useBorrowService() hook from Phase 0
Long stale time since these are immutable contract parameters (staleTime: Infinity or 1 hour)
Accepts symbol parameter (default 'GBPm')
Enabled only when sdk is not null: enabled: !!sdk
Returns standard React Query object: { data: SystemParams | undefined, isLoading, error }
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-collateral-price read hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook that fetches the current collateral price for computing LTV, liquidation price, and formatting prices.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-collateral-price.ts
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'collateralPrice', symbol]
Calls sdk.getCollateralPrice(symbol) — returns price as bigint (18 decimals)
Polls at 60-second intervals (refetchInterval: 60_000)
Enabled only when sdk is not null
Returns { data: bigint | undefined, isLoading, error }
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-user-troves read hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook that fetches all trove positions for the connected wallet so the dashboard can list them.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-user-troves.ts
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'userTroves', symbol, account]
Calls sdk.getUserTroves(symbol, account) — returns array of BorrowPosition
Uses useAccount() from wagmi to get connected address
Refetches on 15-second interval (refetchInterval: 15_000)
Enabled only when sdk is not null AND account is defined
Returns { data: BorrowPosition[] | undefined, isLoading, error }
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-trove-data read hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook that fetches detailed data for a single trove, used by the manage-trove view.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-trove-data.ts
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'troveData', symbol, troveId]
Calls sdk.getTroveData(symbol, troveId) — returns BorrowPosition
Refetches on 15-second interval
Enabled only when sdk is not null AND troveId is provided
Returns { data: BorrowPosition | undefined, isLoading, error }
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-branch-stats read hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook for branch-level aggregate stats (total collateral, total debt, average interest rate) for the dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-branch-stats.ts
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'branchStats', symbol]
Calls sdk.getBranchStats(symbol) — returns aggregate data
Also fetches sdk.getAverageInterestRate(symbol) and includes it in the returned data
Refetches on 60-second interval
Enabled only when sdk is not null
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-interest-rate-brackets read hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook that fetches the interest rate bracket distribution for chart rendering and redemption risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-interest-rate-brackets.ts
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'interestRateBrackets', symbol]
Calls sdk.getInterestRateBrackets(symbol) — returns InterestRateBracket[]
Refetches on 60-second interval
Enabled only when sdk is not null
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-borrow-allowance and use-next-owner-index hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need hooks for token allowance checks and next trove index, used by write flows in Phase 2.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-borrow-allowance.ts
useBorrowAllowance(symbol, account) calls sdk.getCollateralAllowance() and sdk.getDebtAllowance() — returns { collateralAllowance: bigint, debtAllowance: bigint }
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'allowance', symbol, account]
Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-next-owner-index.ts
useNextOwnerIndex(symbol, owner) calls sdk.getNextOwnerIndex(symbol, owner) — returns next trove index
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'nextOwnerIndex', symbol, owner]
Both enabled only when sdk not null and account defined
Export both from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-predict-upfront-fee hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook that predicts the upfront fee for opening a trove, shown in the open-trove form summary.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-predict-upfront-fee.ts
usePredictUpfrontFee(symbol, borrowAmount, interestRateIndex) calls the SDK method (e.g., sdk.predictOpenTroveUpfrontFee())
Uses debounced inputs — follow the useDebounce(amount, 350) pattern from swap hooks (use-swap-quote.ts)
Uses useQuery with query key ['borrow', 'upfrontFee', symbol, debouncedBorrowAmount, interestRateIndex]
Enabled only when sdk not null and borrowAmount > 0
Returns { data: bigint | undefined, isLoading }
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
userStories.notes: Check if the swap feature has a useDebounce utility that can be reused, or create one in the borrow hooks.

userStories.title: Create use-loan-details derived hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a derived hook that combines collateral price with SDK math to compute LTV, liquidation price, and risk level.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-loan-details.ts
useLoanDetails(collAmount, debtAmount, interestRate, symbol) combines useCollateralPrice + SDK getLoanDetails() math
Returns LoanDetails type (LTV, liquidation price, risk level, max debt, status) — all computed client-side
Uses useMemo — this is pure client-side calculation from existing query data, NOT a useQuery call
Recomputes when any input changes (collAmount, debtAmount, interestRate, price)
Handles null/undefined price gracefully (returns null fields in LoanDetails)
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
userStories.notes: SDK getLoanDetails() is a pure math function — call it directly with the price from useCollateralPrice.

userStories.title: Create use-debt-suggestions and use-redemption-risk derived hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need derived hooks for suggesting safe debt amounts and assessing redemption risk at a given interest rate.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-debt-suggestions.ts
useDebtSuggestions(collAmount, symbol) combines useLoanDetails + SDK calculateDebtSuggestions() — returns suggested debt amounts at different risk levels
Uses useMemo for client-side computation (not useQuery)
Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-redemption-risk.ts
useRedemptionRisk(interestRate, symbol) combines useInterestRateBrackets + SDK getRedemptionRisk() — returns risk level for a given rate
Uses useMemo for client-side computation
Export both from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-interest-rate-chart-data derived hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook that transforms interest rate bracket data into chart-friendly format for the open-trove form.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-interest-rate-chart-data.ts
useInterestRateChartData(symbol) consumes useInterestRateBrackets and transforms to chart-friendly format
Output: array of { rate: number, debt: number } (JS numbers for chart libraries) or similar shape
Optionally accepts currentRate param to highlight user's position in the distribution
Uses useMemo for the transformation
Export from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)

userStories.title: Create use-stability-pool and use-stability-pool-stats hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need hooks that read Stability Pool data via direct contract calls (not in SDK) so the dashboard can show SP positions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-stability-pool.ts
Uses useReadContract or useReadContracts from wagmi with stabilityPoolAbi from Phase 0
Reads for connected user: getCompoundedBoldDeposit(account), getDepositorCollGain(account), getDepositorYieldGain(account)
Returns StabilityPoolPosition type: { deposit, collateralGain, debtTokenGain }
Resolve StabilityPool contract address via SDK address resolution if possible, or hardcode for GBPm initially (document approach)
Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/hooks/use-stability-pool-stats.ts
useStabilityPoolStats(symbol) reads getTotalBoldDeposits() — returns total pool size as bigint
User position hook: enabled when account connected, refetch 30s interval
Pool stats hook: always enabled when sdk not null, refetch 30s interval
Export both from hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
userStories.notes: StabilityPool address resolved via SDK getBorrowRegistry + resolveAddressesFromRegistry. Internal useStabilityPoolAddress hook caches with staleTime: Infinity.

userStories.title: Create deployment atom and debt token selector component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select which debt token to view (GBPm now, CHFm/JPYm later) so the dashboard shows the right data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/web3/src/features/borrow/atoms/deployment-atoms.ts
selectedDebtTokenAtom — Jotai atom holding selected DebtTokenConfig, defaults to GBPm from DEBT_TOKEN_CONFIGS
Export from atoms/index.ts barrel
Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/shared/debt-token-selector.tsx
Renders dropdown or segmented control showing available debt tokens
GBPm is active/selectable; CHFm and JPYm show 'Coming soon' badge and are disabled
Selecting a token updates selectedDebtTokenAtom
Uses @repo/ui components (Select, Button) where appropriate
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill: selector shows GBPm selected, other options disabled
userStories.notes: DEBT_TOKEN_CONFIGS is Record<string, DebtTokenConfig> — use non-null assertion (!) when accessing by key.

userStories.title: Create risk badge component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a color-coded risk badge on my positions so I can quickly assess their health.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/shared/risk-badge.tsx
Accepts risk: RiskLevel | null prop (from SDK: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high')
Renders colored badge: Low = green, Medium = amber/yellow, High = red
When null, renders nothing or a muted 'N/A' state
Uses existing Tailwind color utilities and @repo/ui Badge component if available
Compact size suitable for cards and table rows
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill: badge renders correctly with all three states

userStories.title: Create trove metrics display component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see key trove metrics (LTV, liquidation price, interest rate) in a consistent format across views.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/shared/trove-metrics.tsx
Accepts loanDetails: LoanDetails | null and debtToken: DebtTokenConfig props
Displays: LTV (via formatLtv), liquidation price (via formatPrice), interest rate (via formatInterestRate), status
Each metric is a label + value pair in a grid or flex layout
Uses risk badge component for the risk level
Handles loading/null state gracefully (shows skeleton or '—' placeholder)
Uses formatting utilities from Phase 0 (formatLtv, formatPrice, formatInterestRate from @repo/web3)
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create position card component
userStories.description: As a user, I want each trove position shown as a card on the dashboard with key metrics at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/dashboard/position-card.tsx
Accepts position: BorrowPosition and debtToken: DebtTokenConfig props
Displays: collateral amount (formatCollateralAmount), debt amount (formatDebtAmount), LTV with risk badge, liquidation price, interest rate
Uses useLoanDetails derived hook to compute LTV and risk from position data
Uses useCollateralPrice hook for price data
Clicking the card updates borrowViewAtom to { view: 'manage-trove', troveId: position.troveId }
Uses @repo/ui Card component for consistent styling
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create stability card component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my Stability Pool deposit as a card on the dashboard with pending rewards.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/dashboard/stability-card.tsx
Accepts position: StabilityPoolPosition and debtToken: DebtTokenConfig props
Displays: deposit amount (formatDebtAmount), collateral gain (formatCollateralAmount), debt token yield gain
Shows pool share percentage if total pool size available (from useStabilityPoolStats)
Clicking the card updates borrowViewAtom to 'earn'
Uses @repo/ui Card component for consistent styling
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create borrow dashboard view
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all my borrow positions and SP deposits on a dashboard when I click the Borrow tab.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/app.mento.org/app/components/borrow/dashboard/borrow-dashboard.tsx
Uses useUserTroves hook to fetch open troves for connected wallet
Uses useStabilityPool hook to fetch SP position for connected wallet
Renders a position card for each active trove
Renders a stability card if user has an SP deposit (deposit > 0)
Shows debt token selector at the top
Shows 'Open Trove' and 'Earn' action buttons/CTAs
Empty state when no positions: friendly message + CTA to open first trove or deposit into SP
Loading state: skeleton or shimmer placeholders while data fetches
Not-connected state: message prompting wallet connection
Update borrow-view.tsx to render <BorrowDashboard /> when borrowViewAtom is 'dashboard' (replacing Phase 0 placeholder)
Typecheck passes (pnpm check-types)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill: dashboard renders empty state when no positions, or shows cards when positions exist
userStories.notes: Follow pools-view.tsx layout pattern: max-w-5xl container with top-decorations, bg-card styling.
